sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58551" key="*kolakofwroklei/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Κολᾰκοφωροκλείδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n58551.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flattering son of a thief</tr_>, parody on the name of Hierocleides, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0496.tlg001:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
